articles.author: Maureen Groppe, Jeanine Santucci
articles.title: Supreme Court upholds conviction in infamous Etan Patz NYC murder - USA Today
articles.description: Six-year-old Etan Patz vanished in 1979 in one of the most infamous cold cases in American history.
articles.content: WASHINGTON The Supreme Court ruled June 22 that a man convicted of kidnapping and murdering a 6-year-old in one of the most infamous cold cases in American history should not be granted a new trial.… [+3047 chars]
